description: Complete DESIGN.md compliance — filters, summary chips, code examples, guide viewer, checklist, progress bar, markdown export, array type-change detection

specs.description: Array length changes are detected as type-changes
specs.given: v1 has field tags: ["a","b"] and v2 has field tags: ["a","b","c"]
specs.then: Returns a type-change result for 'tags' with oldType 'array[2]' and newType 'array[3]'

domain_conventions.array_comparison: Arrays compared by serialized value; length difference triggers type-change

specs.description: Filter buttons narrow diff results to selected change type
specs.given: A diff result set containing removed, renamed, added, and unchanged entries
specs.when: User clicks the 'breaking' filter button in the web UI
specs.then: Only removed, type-change, renamed, and moved entries are displayed; added and unchanged are hidden

specs.description: Summary chips show counts per change type
specs.given: A diff result with 2 removed, 1 renamed, 3 added, 5 unchanged
specs.then: Summary chips display '2 removed', '1 renamed', '3 added' with correct badge colors; unchanged count is shown muted

specs.description: Clicking a diff row expands code examples
specs.given: A diff row showing a renamed field 'billing' → 'collection_method'
specs.then: An expandable section appears below showing before/after code in Node and Python tabs

specs.description: Migration guide viewer renders timeline, changes, and checklist
specs.given: A diff result with base version 'v1', revision 'v2', and sunset date '2025-06-01'
specs.then: Guide view shows: timeline (deprecated → migration window → sunset), change sections with severity badges, and interactive checklist items

specs.description: Checklist state persists in localStorage across page refreshes
specs.given: User has checked 2 of 5 checklist items in the migration guide
specs.when: User refreshes the browser page and re-generates the same guide
specs.then: The same 2 items are still checked; state is restored from localStorage keyed by btoa(base:revision)

specs.description: Progress bar reflects checklist completion percentage
specs.then: Progress bar shows 50% filled with text '2 of 4 complete'

specs.description: Export as markdown produces a downloadable migration guide
specs.given: A fully rendered migration guide with changes and checklist
specs.then: Browser downloads a .md file containing the guide title, timeline, each change with summary and severity, and checklist items with [x] or [ ] markers

specs.description: Guide viewer never uses innerHTML with user-originated data
specs.given: A JSON response containing a field value of '<script>alert(1)</script>'
specs.when: The guide viewer renders this value in any section (diff table, code examples, checklist)
specs.then: The script tag is rendered as visible escaped text, not executed; all rendering uses createElement + textContent

specs.description: Empty diff produces a clean empty state in guide viewer
specs.given: Two identical JSON objects are compared
specs.then: Guide shows 'No changes detected — no migration required' with an empty checklist and 100% progress
